attributes.name: HONESTCUE Non-Browser Process Fetch from raw.githubusercontent.com
attributes.description: Detects HTTPS connections to raw.githubusercontent.com from processes that are not browsers, git clients, curl/wget, or package managers. HONESTCUE v2 fetches its Gemini-shaped JSON response and stage-3 PE from GitHub raw-hosting to produce real TLS+DNS+SNI IOCs.
attributes.query: network where event.type == "start" and destination.domain : ("raw.githubusercontent.com","objects.githubusercontent.com") and not process.name : ("chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","Code.exe","devenv.exe","cursor.exe","zed.exe","git.exe","git-remote-https.exe","GitHubDesktop.exe","curl.exe","wget.exe","ssh.exe")
author: F0RT1KA Defense Guidance Builder
false_positives: Authorized internal tooling fetching GitHub-hosted configs

attributes.name: Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp.dll Loaded in Non-Dev Process
attributes.description: Detects the Roslyn C# compiler DLL being loaded by a process that is not a developer tool, build server, or IDE. HONESTCUE v2 stage 2 is a self-contained .NET 8 executable that loads Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp at runtime to compile LLM-sourced C# in memory. Produces no csc.exe child spawn because Roslyn compiles in-process.
attributes.query: library where dll.name : ("Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp.dll","Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.dll") and not process.name : ("devenv.exe","Code.exe","dotnet.exe","MSBuild.exe","csc.exe","rider64.exe","ServiceHub.Host.CLR.x64.exe","JetBrains.Rider.exe")

technique.name: Obfuscated Files or Information: Compile After Delivery

author: F0RT1KA Defense Guidance Builder
false_positives: In-house .NET plugin hosts that use Roslyn at runtime

attributes.name: Reflective Assembly Load via byte[] (AMSI)
attributes.description: Detects AMSI events containing Assembly.Load invocations with a byte[] argument. Canonical reflective assembly-load technique used by HONESTCUE stage 2 and many other offensive .NET tools to avoid on-disk PE signatures. Matches both Roslyn (v2) and CSharpCodeProvider (v1) paths.
attributes.query: any where event.category in ("process","powershell") and (powershell.file.script_block_text : ("*[System.Reflection.Assembly]::Load*","*System.Reflection.Assembly.Load*","*[Reflection.Assembly]::Load*","*Assembly.Load(*")) and powershell.file.script_block_text : ("*[byte[]]*","*System.Byte[]*","*byte[]*")
author: F0RT1KA Defense Guidance Builder

attributes.name: Exact GTIG HONESTCUE Prompts in Process Command Line
attributes.description: Detects processes invoked with command-line arguments containing verbatim GTIG-disclosed HONESTCUE prompts. The class name HonestcueStage2 combined with signature prompt phrases is a distinctive string-level IOC. Primarily intended to match against process command lines in scripted-loader scenarios.
attributes.query: process where event.type == "start" and process.command_line : ("*HonestcueStage2*","*You are an expert C# developer*","*.NET Framework 4.x APIs*")
author: F0RT1KA Defense Guidance Builder
false_positives: Unlikely; the string HonestcueStage2 is highly specific

attributes.name: Unsigned PE Execution from c:\Windows\Temp
attributes.description: Detects process execution of a PE located under c:\Windows\Temp where the binary is not trust-signed by a known publisher. HONESTCUE v2 stage 3 fetches a payload from GitHub raw, drops to c:\Windows\Temp, and executes. Complements the file-drop rule.
attributes.query: process where event.type == "start" and process.executable : "?:\\Windows\\Temp\\*.exe" and not process.parent.name : ("TrustedInstaller.exe","MsiExec.exe","setup.exe")
author: F0RT1KA Defense Guidance Builder
false_positives: Legacy application installers staging temp binaries

attributes.name: Non-Browser Process Contacts LLM API Endpoint
attributes.description: Detects HTTPS/TLS connections from non-browser processes to well-known LLM API hostnames. HONESTCUE-class malware issues POSTs directly to Gemini/OpenAI/Anthropic endpoints from a launcher process rather than a browser. Tune the allowlist to match the organization's approved AI tooling inventory. (Kept for v1 compatibility — v2's Stage 1 uses GitHub-raw rather than a direct Gemini endpoint, but organizations running real HONESTCUE campaigns in the wild still see direct-Gemini hits.)
attributes.query: network where event.type == "start" and destination.domain : ("generativelanguage.googleapis.com","api.openai.com","api.anthropic.com","api.cohere.ai") and not process.name : ("chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","Code.exe","devenv.exe","cursor.exe","windsurf.exe","zed.exe")
author: F0RT1KA Defense Guidance Builder

attributes.name: PE Dropped to c:\Windows\Temp by Same Process That Fetched from GitHub-Raw
attributes.description: Sequence correlation: same process (by PID) fetches from raw.githubusercontent.com, then writes a PE under c:\Windows\Temp within 2 minutes, then that PE executes within 5 minutes. Matches HONESTCUE v2 stage 3 end-to-end.
attributes.query: sequence by process.entity_id with maxspan=10m [network where destination.domain : "raw.githubusercontent.com"] [file where event.type == "creation" and file.extension == "exe" and file.path : "?:\\Windows\\Temp\\*"]
author: F0RT1KA Defense Guidance Builder
false_positives: Very rare; software installers occasionally match a subset
